metadata.description: Rails 8 & Hotwire development skills — vanilla-first stack, pure RSpec, Turbo/Stimulus/Hotwire Native, OpenAPI via rswag, ruby_llm, Kamal 2

plugins.name: rails-stack
plugins.description: Rails 8.1 + Hotwire development doctrine: vanilla-first stack, pure RSpec testing, Turbo/Stimulus/Hotwire Native, OpenAPI docs via rswag, ruby_llm AI features, Kamal 2 deployment. Bundles the rails-8 and hotwire skills.

plugins.name: rails-flow
plugins.description: Agentic development flow for Rails 8 projects — /feature, /fix, /review, /setup-flow and /brain commands, eight specialist subagents (developer, migration-writer, code-reviewer, test-runner, security-auditor, design-auditor, doc-updater, pr-reviewer), and guardrail hooks that mechanically enforce spec-proven changes, safe migrations and git discipline. Pairs with the rails-stack skills.

plugins.name: qa-flow
plugins.description: Independent QA engineering flow — risk-based planning, black-box execution (Playwright, Schemathesis, axe-core, k6, OWASP ZAP), defect filing, and a hook-enforced dev->main certification gate. Smoke gates, regression validates, certification stamps. Tests the running app from the outside, independent of the developer suite.

plugins.name: pipeline
plugins.description: Lifecycle orchestrator over rails-flow and qa-flow — build -> verify -> certify -> containerized release, honoring every gate. Release artifact is a versioned ghcr.io Docker image (local pull-and-run today, Kamal cloud when ready). /pipeline:deploy-cloud reads a prepared .env and generates the full Kamal 2 config + wires secrets safely (committed deploy.yml references names; gitignored .kamal/secrets holds values), then deploys with approval.

plugins.name: skill-maintainer
plugins.description: Issue-driven maintenance flow for this marketplace — turns downstream bug reports into source-verified fixes and shipped releases. /skill-maintainer:setup-intake (GitHub issue templates + label taxonomy), :triage (classify by component/type/priority), :work (one issue end-to-end: verify against source-of-truth -> fix -> PR -> bump+CHANGELOG -> release), :audit (proactive review). A BLOCKING doctrine-verifier gates every skill edit on an authoritative citation.
